name: gdt-unity-mcp-server
description: Allows AI agent Chat to control Unity Editor — create prefabs, scenes, GameObjects, components, and scripts via natural language.

chatParticipants.name: unity
chatParticipants.description: Controls Unity Editor: create prefabs, scenes, GameObjects, scripts, and components.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Check connection status with Unity Editor

commands.name: undo
commands.description: Undo the last operation in Unity Editor

commands.name: redo
commands.description: Redo the last undone operation in Unity Editor

commands.name: history
commands.description: Show the current undo history group

commands.title: Unity MCP: Install Bridge into Unity Project
Unity MCP: Connect to Unity Editor
Unity MCP: Disconnect from Unity Editor

gdt-unity-mcp.bridgePort.description: Port number for the Unity Editor WebSocket bridge server.

gdt-unity-mcp.autoConnect.description: Automatically attempt to connect to Unity Editor on activation.
